积分表的推导

发表于2021-05-10|更新于2021-05-19|数学
|阅读量:

积分表的推导

由于太久没有使用积分，导致已经不会积分，因此在这里记录一下积分表的推导，巩固一下基础。

特此声明：在该篇文章中，最后答案可能会与答案些许不同，请读者自行化简。

含有ax+bax+bax+b的积分

1.∫dxax+b=1aln∣ax+b∣+C\begin{aligned} 1.\int \frac{dx}{ax+b}=\frac{1}{a} \ln \vert ax+b \vert+C \end{aligned}​1.∫​ax+b​​dx​​=​a​​1​​ln∣ax+b∣+C​​

∫dxax+b=1a∫d(ax+b)ax+b=1aln∣ax+b∣+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{dx}{ax+b}&=\frac{1}{a}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{ax+b}\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\ln\vert ax+b\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​ax+b​​dx​​​​​​=​a​​1​​∫​ax+b​​d(ax+b)​​​=​a​​1​​ln∣ax+b∣+C​​

2.∫(ax+b)μdx=1a(μ+1)(ax+b)μ+1+C(μ≠−1)\begin{aligned} 2.\int(ax+b)^{\mu}\,dx=\frac{1}{a(\mu+1)}(ax+b)^{\mu+1}+C(\mu \neq -1) \end{aligned}​2.∫(ax+b)​μ​​dx=​a(μ+1)​​1​​(ax+b)​μ+1​​+C(μ≠−1)​​

∫(ax+b)μdx=1a∫(ax+b)μd(ax+b)=1a(ax+b)μ+1μ+1+C\begin{aligned} \int(ax+b)^{\mu}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a}\int(ax+b)^\mu\,d(ax+b)\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\frac{(ax+b)^{\mu+1}}{\mu+1}+C \end{aligned} ​∫(ax+b)​μ​​dx​​​​=​a​​1​​∫(ax+b)​μ​​d(ax+b)​=​a​​1​​​μ+1​​(ax+b)​μ+1​​​​+C​​

3.∫xax+bdx=1a2(ax+b−bln∣ax+b∣)+C\begin{aligned} 3.\int\frac{x}{ax+b}\,dx=\frac{1}{a^2}(ax+b-b\ln\vert ax+b\vert)+C \end{aligned}​3.∫​ax+b​​x​​dx=​a​2​​​​1​​(ax+b−bln∣ax+b∣)+C​​

∫xax+bdx=1a∫ax+b−bax+bdx=1a(∫dx−∫bax+bdx)=1a(∫dx−ba∫d(ax+b)ax+b)=1a(x−baln∣ax+b∣)+C=xa−ba2ln∣ax+b∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x}{ax+b}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a}\int\frac{ax+b-b}{ax+b}\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\left( \int\,dx -\int\frac{b}{ax+b}\,dx\right)\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\left(\int\,dx -\frac{b}{a}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{ax+b} \right)\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\left( x-\frac{b}{a}\ln\vert ax+b\vert\right)+C\\ &=\frac{x}{a}-\frac{b}{a^2}\ln\vert ax+b\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​ax+b​​x​​dx​​​​​​​=​a​​1​​∫​ax+b​​ax+b−b​​dx​=​a​​1​​(∫dx−∫​ax+b​​b​​dx)​=​a​​1​​(∫dx−​a​​b​​∫​ax+b​​d(ax+b)​​)​=​a​​1​​(x−​a​​b​​ln∣ax+b∣)+C​=​a​​x​​−​a​2​​​​b​​ln∣ax+b∣+C​​

4.∫x2ax+bdx=1a3[12(ax+b)2−2b(ax+b)+b2ln∣ax+b∣]+C\begin{aligned} 4.\int\frac{x^2}{ax+b}\,dx=\frac{1}{a^3}\left[ \frac{1}{2}(ax+b)^2-2b(ax+b)+b^2\ln\vert ax+b\vert \right]+C \end{aligned}​4.∫​ax+b​​x​2​​​​dx=​a​3​​​​1​​[​2​​1​​(ax+b)​2​​−2b(ax+b)+b​2​​ln∣ax+b∣]+C​​

∫x2ax+bdx=1a2∫(ax+b)2−2b(ax+b)+b2ax+bdx=1a2∫(ax+b−2b+b2ax+b)dx=1a2(∫(ax−b)dx+∫b2ax+bdx)=1a2(∫(ax−b)dx+b2a∫d(ax+b)ax+b)=1a2(ax22−bx+b2aln∣ax+b∣)+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x^2}{ax+b}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a^2}\int\frac{(ax+b)^2-2b(ax+b)+b^2}{ax+b}\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\int \left(ax+b-2b+\frac{b^2}{ax+b}\right)\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\left(\int (ax-b)\,dx+\int\frac{b^2}{ax+b}\,dx\right)\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\left(\int (ax-b)\,dx+\frac{b^2}{a}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{ax+b}\right)\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\left(\frac{ax^2}{2}-bx+\frac{b^2}{a}\ln\vert ax+b\vert\right)+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​ax+b​​x​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​​=​a​2​​​​1​​∫​ax+b​​(ax+b)​2​​−2b(ax+b)+b​2​​​​dx​=​a​2​​​​1​​∫(ax+b−2b+​ax+b​​b​2​​​​)dx​=​a​2​​​​1​​(∫(ax−b)dx+∫​ax+b​​b​2​​​​dx)​=​a​2​​​​1​​(∫(ax−b)dx+​a​​b​2​​​​∫​ax+b​​d(ax+b)​​)​=​a​2​​​​1​​(​2​​ax​2​​​​−bx+​a​​b​2​​​​ln∣ax+b∣)+C​​

5.∫dxx(ax+b)=−1bln∣ax+bx∣+C\begin{aligned} 5.\int\frac{dx}{x(ax+b)}=-\frac{1}{b}\ln\left\vert \frac{ax+b}{x} \right\vert+C \end{aligned}​5.∫​x(ax+b)​​dx​​=−​b​​1​​ln​∣​∣​​​x​​ax+b​​​∣​∣​​+C​​

1x(ax+b)=Ax+Bax+bx1=0orx2=−baA=[1x(ax+b)⋅(x)]∣x=0=1bB=[1x(ax+b)⋅(ax+b)]∣x=−ba=−ab\begin{aligned} &\frac{1}{x(ax+b)}=\frac{A}{x}+\frac{B}{ax+b}\\ &x_1=0\,or\,x_2=-\frac{b}{a}\\ &A=\left[ \frac{1}{x(ax+b)}\cdot(x) \right]_{\vert x=0}=\frac{1}{b}\\ &B=\left[ \frac{1}{x(ax+b)}\cdot(ax+b) \right]_{\vert x=-\frac{b}{a}}=-\frac{a}{b}\\ \end{aligned} ​​​​​​​​​x(ax+b)​​1​​=​x​​A​​+​ax+b​​B​​​x​1​​=0orx​2​​=−​a​​b​​​A=[​x(ax+b)​​1​​⋅(x)]​∣x=0​​=​b​​1​​​B=[​x(ax+b)​​1​​⋅(ax+b)]​∣x=−​a​​b​​​​=−​b​​a​​​​

可得：

∫dxx(ax+b)=∫(1bx−ab(ax+b))dx=1b∫1xdx−ab∫dx(ax+b)=1b∫1xdx−1b∫d(ax+b)(ax+b)=1b(ln∣x∣−ln∣ax+b∣)+C=1bln∣xax+b∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x(ax+b)}&=\int\left( \frac{1}{bx}-\frac{a}{b(ax+b)}\right)\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{1}{x}\,dx-\frac{a}{b}\int\frac{\,dx}{(ax+b)}\\ &=\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{1}{x}\,dx-\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{\,d(ax+b)}{(ax+b)}\\ &=\frac{1}{b}\left( \ln\vert x\vert-\ln\vert ax+b\vert \right)+C\\ &=\frac{1}{b}\ln\left\vert \frac{x}{ax+b} \right\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x(ax+b)​​dx​​​​​​​​​=∫(​bx​​1​​−​b(ax+b)​​a​​)dx​=​b​​1​​∫​x​​1​​dx−​b​​a​​∫​(ax+b)​​dx​​​=​b​​1​​∫​x​​1​​dx−​b​​1​​∫​(ax+b)​​d(ax+b)​​​=​b​​1​​(ln∣x∣−ln∣ax+b∣)+C​=​b​​1​​ln​∣​∣​∣​∣​​​ax+b​​x​​​∣​∣​∣​∣​​+C​​

6.∫dxx2(ax+b)=−1bx+ab2ln∣ax+bx∣+C\begin{aligned} 6.\int\frac{dx}{x^2(ax+b)}=-\frac{1}{bx}+\frac{a}{b^2}\ln\left\vert \frac{ax+b}{x} \right\vert+C \end{aligned}​6.∫​x​2​​(ax+b)​​dx​​=−​bx​​1​​+​b​2​​​​a​​ln​∣​∣​​​x​​ax+b​​​∣​∣​​+C​​

1x2(ax+b)=Ax+Bx2+Cax+bx1,2=0orx3=−baA=ddx[1x2(ax+b)⋅x2]∣x=0=−ab2B=[1x2(ax+b)⋅x2]∣x=0=1bC=[1x2(ax+b)⋅(ax+b)]∣x=−ba=a2b2\begin{aligned} &\frac{1}{x^2(ax+b)}=\frac{A}{x}+\frac{B}{x^2}+\frac{C}{ax+b}\\ &x_{1,2}=0\,or\,x_3=-\frac{b}{a}\\ &A=\frac{d}{dx}\left[ \frac{1}{x^2(ax+b)}\cdot x^2 \right]_{\vert x=0}=-\frac{a}{b^2}\\ &B=\left[ \frac{1}{x^2(ax+b)}\cdot x^2 \right]_{\vert x=0}=\frac{1}{b}\\ &C=\left[ \frac{1}{x^2(ax+b)}\cdot (ax+b) \right]_{\vert x=-\frac{b}{a}}=\frac{a^2}{b^2}\\ \end{aligned} ​​​​​​​​​​x​2​​(ax+b)​​1​​=​x​​A​​+​x​2​​​​B​​+​ax+b​​C​​​x​1,2​​=0orx​3​​=−​a​​b​​​A=​dx​​d​​[​x​2​​(ax+b)​​1​​⋅x​2​​]​∣x=0​​=−​b​2​​​​a​​​B=[​x​2​​(ax+b)​​1​​⋅x​2​​]​∣x=0​​=​b​​1​​​C=[​x​2​​(ax+b)​​1​​⋅(ax+b)]​∣x=−​a​​b​​​​=​b​2​​​​a​2​​​​​​

可得：

∫dxx2(ax+b)=∫(−ab2x+1bx2+a2b2(ax+b))dx=−ab2∫dxx+1b∫dxx2+a2b2∫dxax+b=−ab2∫dxx+1b∫dxx2+ab2∫d(ax+b)ax+b=−ab2ln∣x∣−1b⋅1x+ab2ln∣ax+b∣+C=ab2ln∣ax+bx∣−1bx+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x^2(ax+b)}&=\int\left( -\frac{a}{b^2x}+\frac{1}{bx^2}+\frac{a^2}{b^2(ax+b)} \right)\,dx\\ &=-\frac{a}{b^2}\int\frac{dx}{x}+\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{dx}{x^2}+\frac{a^2}{b^2}\int\frac{dx}{ax+b}\\ &=-\frac{a}{b^2}\int\frac{dx}{x}+\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{dx}{x^2}+\frac{a}{b^2}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{ax+b}\\ &=-\frac{a}{b^2}\ln\vert x\vert-\frac{1}{b}\cdot\frac{1}{x}+\frac{a}{b^2}\ln\vert ax+b\vert+C\\ &=\frac{a}{b^2}\ln\left\vert \frac{ax+b}{x} \right\vert-\frac{1}{bx}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x​2​​(ax+b)​​dx​​​​​​​​​=∫(−​b​2​​x​​a​​+​bx​2​​​​1​​+​b​2​​(ax+b)​​a​2​​​​)dx​=−​b​2​​​​a​​∫​x​​dx​​+​b​​1​​∫​x​2​​​​dx​​+​b​2​​​​a​2​​​​∫​ax+b​​dx​​​=−​b​2​​​​a​​∫​x​​dx​​+​b​​1​​∫​x​2​​​​dx​​+​b​2​​​​a​​∫​ax+b​​d(ax+b)​​​=−​b​2​​​​a​​ln∣x∣−​b​​1​​⋅​x​​1​​+​b​2​​​​a​​ln∣ax+b∣+C​=​b​2​​​​a​​ln​∣​∣​∣​∣​​​x​​ax+b​​​∣​∣​∣​∣​​−​bx​​1​​+C​​

7.∫x(ax+b)2dx=1a2(ln∣ax+b∣+bax+b)+C\begin{aligned} 7.\int\frac{x}{(ax+b)^2}\,dx=\frac{1}{a^2}\left(\ln\vert ax+b\vert+\frac{b}{ax+b}\right)+C \end{aligned}​7.∫​(ax+b)​2​​​​x​​dx=​a​2​​​​1​​(ln∣ax+b∣+​ax+b​​b​​)+C​​

∫x(ax+b)2dx=1a∫x(ax+b)2d(ax+b)=−1a∫xd(1ax+b)=−1a(xax+b−∫dxax+b)=−1a[xax+b−1a∫d(ax+b)ax+b]=1a2ln∣ax+b∣−xa(ax+b)+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x}{(ax+b)^2}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a}\int\frac{x}{(ax+b)^2}\,d(ax+b)\\ &=-\frac{1}{a}\int x\,d\left(\frac{1}{ax+b}\right)\\ &=-\frac{1}{a}\left( \frac{x}{ax+b}-\int\frac{dx}{ax+b} \right)\\ &=-\frac{1}{a}\left[ \frac{x}{ax+b}-\frac{1}{a}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{ax+b} \right]\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\ln\vert ax+b\vert-\frac{x}{a(ax+b)}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​(ax+b)​2​​​​x​​dx​​​​​​​=​a​​1​​∫​(ax+b)​2​​​​x​​d(ax+b)​=−​a​​1​​∫xd(​ax+b​​1​​)​=−​a​​1​​(​ax+b​​x​​−∫​ax+b​​dx​​)​=−​a​​1​​[​ax+b​​x​​−​a​​1​​∫​ax+b​​d(ax+b)​​]​=​a​2​​​​1​​ln∣ax+b∣−​a(ax+b)​​x​​+C​​

结果与答案稍有不同，请读者自行化简。

8.∫x2(ax+b)2dx=1a3(ax+b−2bln∣ax+b∣−b2ax+b)+C\begin{aligned} 8.\int\frac{x^2}{(ax+b)^2}\,dx=\frac{1}{a^3}\left(ax+b-2b\ln\vert ax+b\vert-\frac{b^2}{ax+b}\right)+C \end{aligned}​8.∫​(ax+b)​2​​​​x​2​​​​dx=​a​3​​​​1​​(ax+b−2bln∣ax+b∣−​ax+b​​b​2​​​​)+C​​

∫x2(ax+b)2dx=1a2∫(ax+b)2−2b(ax+b)+b2(ax+b)2dx=1a2∫1−2bax+b+b2(ax+b)2dx=1a2[∫dx−2ba∫d(ax+b)ax+b+b2a∫d(ax+b)(ax+b)2]=1a2(x−2ba⋅ln∣ax+b∣−b2a⋅1ax+b)+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x^2}{(ax+b)^2}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a^2}\int\frac{(ax+b)^2-2b(ax+b)+b^2}{(ax+b)^2}\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\int1-\frac{2b}{ax+b}+\frac{b^2}{(ax+b)^2}\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\left[ \int\,dx-\frac{2b}{a}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{ax+b}+\frac{b^2}{a}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{(ax+b)^2} \right]\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\left( x-\frac{2b}{a}\cdot\ln\vert ax+b\vert-\frac{b^2}{a}\cdot\frac{1}{ax+b} \right)+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​(ax+b)​2​​​​x​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​=​a​2​​​​1​​∫​(ax+b)​2​​​​(ax+b)​2​​−2b(ax+b)+b​2​​​​dx​=​a​2​​​​1​​∫1−​ax+b​​2b​​+​(ax+b)​2​​​​b​2​​​​dx​=​a​2​​​​1​​[∫dx−​a​​2b​​∫​ax+b​​d(ax+b)​​+​a​​b​2​​​​∫​(ax+b)​2​​​​d(ax+b)​​]​=​a​2​​​​1​​(x−​a​​2b​​⋅ln∣ax+b∣−​a​​b​2​​​​⋅​ax+b​​1​​)+C​​

9.∫dxx(ax+b)2=1b(ax+b)−1b2ln∣ax+bx∣+C\begin{aligned} 9.\int\frac{dx}{x(ax+b)^2}=\frac{1}{b(ax+b)}-\frac{1}{b^2}\ln\left\vert \frac{ax+b}{x}\right\vert+C \end{aligned}​9.∫​x(ax+b)​2​​​​dx​​=​b(ax+b)​​1​​−​b​2​​​​1​​ln​∣​∣​​​x​​ax+b​​​∣​∣​​+C​​

1x(ax+b)2=Ax+Bax+b+C(ax+b)21a2x(x+ba)2=Ax+Bax+ba+C(ax+b)2x1=0orx2,3=−baA=[1x(ax+b)2⋅x]∣x=0=1b2B=a⋅ddx[1a2x]∣x=−ba=−ab2C=[1x(ax+b)2⋅(ax+b)2]∣x=−ba=−ab\begin{aligned} &\frac{1}{x(ax+b)^2}=\frac{A}{x}+\frac{B}{ax+b}+\frac{C}{(ax+b)^2}\\ &\frac{\frac{1}{a^2}}{x(x+\frac{b}{a})^2}=\frac{A}{x}+\frac{\frac{B}{a}}{x+\frac{b}{a}}+\frac{C}{(ax+b)^2}\\ &x_1=0\,or\,x_{2,3}=-\frac{b}{a}\\ &A=\left[ \frac{1}{x(ax+b)^2}\cdot x \right]_{\vert x=0}=\frac{1}{b^2}\\ &B=a\cdot\frac{d}{dx}\left[ \frac{\frac{1}{a^2}}{x} \right]_{\vert x=-\frac{b}{a}}=-\frac{a}{b^2}\\ &C=\left[ \frac{1}{x(ax+b)^2}\cdot (ax+b)^2 \right]_{\vert x=-\frac{b}{a}}=-\frac{a}{b}\\ \end{aligned} ​​​​​​​​​​​x(ax+b)​2​​​​1​​=​x​​A​​+​ax+b​​B​​+​(ax+b)​2​​​​C​​​​x(x+​a​​b​​)​2​​​​​a​2​​​​1​​​​=​x​​A​​+​x+​a​​b​​​​​a​​B​​​​+​(ax+b)​2​​​​C​​​x​1​​=0orx​2,3​​=−​a​​b​​​A=[​x(ax+b)​2​​​​1​​⋅x]​∣x=0​​=​b​2​​​​1​​​B=a⋅​dx​​d​​[​x​​​a​2​​​​1​​​​]​∣x=−​a​​b​​​​=−​b​2​​​​a​​​C=[​x(ax+b)​2​​​​1​​⋅(ax+b)​2​​]​∣x=−​a​​b​​​​=−​b​​a​​​​

可得：

∫dxx(ax+b)2=∫(1b2x−ab2(ax+b)−ab(ax+b)2)dx=1b2∫dxx−1b2∫d(ax+b)ax+b−1b∫d(ax+b)(ax+b)2=1b2(ln∣x∣−ln∣ax+b∣)+1b⋅1ax+b+C=1b2(ln∣xax+b∣)+1b(ax+b)+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x(ax+b)^2}&=\int\left(\frac{1}{b^2x}-\frac{a}{b^2(ax+b)}-\frac{a}{b(ax+b)^2}\right)\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{b^2}\int\frac{dx}{x}-\frac{1}{b^2}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{ax+b}-\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{(ax+b)^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{b^2}(\ln\vert x\vert-\ln\vert ax+b\vert)+\frac{1}{b}\cdot\frac{1}{ax+b}+C\\ &=\frac{1}{b^2}(\ln\vert \frac{x}{ax+b}\vert)+\frac{1}{b(ax+b)}+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​x(ax+b)​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​=∫(​b​2​​x​​1​​−​b​2​​(ax+b)​​a​​−​b(ax+b)​2​​​​a​​)dx​=​b​2​​​​1​​∫​x​​dx​​−​b​2​​​​1​​∫​ax+b​​d(ax+b)​​−​b​​1​​∫​(ax+b)​2​​​​d(ax+b)​​​=​b​2​​​​1​​(ln∣x∣−ln∣ax+b∣)+​b​​1​​⋅​ax+b​​1​​+C​=​b​2​​​​1​​(ln∣​ax+b​​x​​∣)+​b(ax+b)​​1​​+C​​

含有ax+b\sqrt{ax+b}√​ax+b​​​的积分

10.∫ax+bdx=23a(ax+b)3+C\begin{aligned} 10.\int\sqrt{ax+b}\,dx=\frac{2}{3 a}\sqrt{(ax+b)^3}+C \end{aligned}​10.∫√​ax+b​​​dx=​3a​​2​​√​(ax+b)​3​​​​​+C​​

∫ax+bdx=1a∫ax+bd(ax+b)=23a(ax+b)3+C\begin{aligned} \int\sqrt{ax+b}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a}\int\sqrt{ax+b}\,d(ax+b)\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}\sqrt{(ax+b)^3}+C \end{aligned} ​∫√​ax+b​​​dx​​​​=​a​​1​​∫√​ax+b​​​d(ax+b)​=​3a​​2​​√​(ax+b)​3​​​​​+C​​

11.∫xax+bdx=215a2⋅(3ax−2b)⋅(ax+b)3+C\begin{aligned} 11.\int x\sqrt{ax+b}\,dx=\frac{2}{15a^2}\cdot(3ax-2b)\cdot\sqrt{(ax+b)^3}+C \end{aligned}​11.∫x√​ax+b​​​dx=​15a​2​​​​2​​⋅(3ax−2b)⋅√​(ax+b)​3​​​​​+C​​

∫xax+bdx=1a∫xax+bd(ax+b)=23a∫xd(ax+b)32=23a[x(ax+b)3−∫(ax+b)32dx]=23a[x(ax+b)3−1a∫(ax+b)32d(ax+b)]=23a[x(ax+b)3−1a⋅25(ax+b)52]+C=215a2⋅(3ax−2b)⋅(ax+b)3+C\begin{aligned} \int x\sqrt{ax+b}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a}\int x\sqrt{ax+b}\,d(ax+b)\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}\int x\,d(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}\left[x\sqrt{(ax+b)^3}-\int(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\,dx\right]\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}\left[x\sqrt{(ax+b)^3}-\frac{1}{a}\int(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\,d(ax+b)\right]\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}\left[x\sqrt{(ax+b)^3}-\frac{1}{a}\cdot\frac{2}{5}(ax+b)^\frac{5}{2}\right]+C\\ &=\frac{2}{15a^2}\cdot(3ax-2b)\cdot\sqrt{(ax+b)^3}+C \end{aligned} ​∫x√​ax+b​​​dx​​​​​​​​=​a​​1​​∫x√​ax+b​​​d(ax+b)​=​3a​​2​​∫xd(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​​=​3a​​2​​[x√​(ax+b)​3​​​​​−∫(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​dx]​=​3a​​2​​[x√​(ax+b)​3​​​​​−​a​​1​​∫(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​d(ax+b)]​=​3a​​2​​[x√​(ax+b)​3​​​​​−​a​​1​​⋅​5​​2​​(ax+b)​​2​​5​​​​]+C​=​15a​2​​​​2​​⋅(3ax−2b)⋅√​(ax+b)​3​​​​​+C​​

12.∫x2ax+bdx=2105a3⋅(15a2x2−12abx+8b2)⋅(ax+b)3+C\begin{aligned} 12.\int x^2\sqrt{ax+b}\,dx=\frac{2}{105a^3}\cdot(15a^2x^2-12abx+8b^2)\cdot\sqrt{(ax+b)^3}+C \end{aligned}​12.∫x​2​​√​ax+b​​​dx=​105a​3​​​​2​​⋅(15a​2​​x​2​​−12abx+8b​2​​)⋅√​(ax+b)​3​​​​​+C​​

∫x2ax+b=1a∫x2ax+bd(ax+b)=23a∫x2d(ax+b)32=23a[x2(ax+b)32−∫(ax+b)32dx2]=23a[x2(ax+b)32−1a∫x(ax+b)32d(ax+b)]=23ax2(ax+b)32−23a⋅1a∫x(ax+b)32d(ax+b)=23ax2(ax+b)32−815a2[x(ax+b)52−∫(ax+b)52dx]=23ax2(ax+b)32−815a2x(ax+b)52−815a2∫(ax+b)52dx=23ax2(ax+b)32−815a2x(ax+b)52−16105a3(ax+b)72+C\begin{aligned} \int x^2\sqrt{ax+b}&=\frac{1}{a}\int x^2\sqrt{ax+b}\,d(ax+b)\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}\int x^2\,d(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}\left[x^2(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}-\int(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\,dx^2\right]\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}\left[x^2(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}-\frac{1}{a}\int x(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\,d(ax+b)\right]\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}x^2(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}-\frac{2}{3a}\cdot\frac{1}{a}\int x(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\,d(ax+b)\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}x^2(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}-\frac{8}{15a^2}\left[x(ax+b)^\frac{5}{2}-\int(ax+b)^\frac{5}{2}dx\right]\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}x^2(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}-\frac{8}{15a^2}x(ax+b)^\frac{5}{2}-\frac{8}{15a^2}\int(ax+b)^\frac{5}{2}dx\\ &=\frac{2}{3a}x^2(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}-\frac{8}{15a^2}x(ax+b)^\frac{5}{2}-\frac{16}{105a^3}(ax+b)^\frac{7}{2}+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫x​2​​√​ax+b​​​​​​​​​​​​​​=​a​​1​​∫x​2​​√​ax+b​​​d(ax+b)​=​3a​​2​​∫x​2​​d(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​​=​3a​​2​​[x​2​​(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​−∫(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​dx​2​​]​=​3a​​2​​[x​2​​(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​−​a​​1​​∫x(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​d(ax+b)]​=​3a​​2​​x​2​​(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​−​3a​​2​​⋅​a​​1​​∫x(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​d(ax+b)​=​3a​​2​​x​2​​(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​−​15a​2​​​​8​​[x(ax+b)​​2​​5​​​​−∫(ax+b)​​2​​5​​​​dx]​=​3a​​2​​x​2​​(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​−​15a​2​​​​8​​x(ax+b)​​2​​5​​​​−​15a​2​​​​8​​∫(ax+b)​​2​​5​​​​dx​=​3a​​2​​x​2​​(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​−​15a​2​​​​8​​x(ax+b)​​2​​5​​​​−​105a​3​​​​16​​(ax+b)​​2​​7​​​​+C​​

13.∫xax+bdx=23a2(ax−2b)ax+b+C\begin{aligned} 13.\int\frac{x}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\,dx=\frac{2}{3a^2}(ax-2b)\sqrt{ax+b}+C \end{aligned}​13.∫​√​ax+b​​​​​x​​dx=​3a​2​​​​2​​(ax−2b)√​ax+b​​​+C​​

∫xax+bdx=1a∫ax+b−bax+bdx=1a∫ax+bdx−ba∫1ax+bdx=1a2∫ax+bd(ax+b)−ba2∫1ax+bd(ax+b)=23a2(ax+b)32−2ba2ax+b+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a}\int\frac{ax+b-b}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\int \sqrt{ax+b}\,dx-\frac{b}{a} \int\frac{1}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\int \sqrt{ax+b}\,d(ax+b)-\frac{b}{a^2} \int\frac{1}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\,d(ax+b)\\ &=\frac{2}{3a^2}(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}-\frac{2b}{a^2} \sqrt{ax+b}+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​√​ax+b​​​​​x​​dx​​​​​​​=​a​​1​​∫​√​ax+b​​​​​ax+b−b​​dx​=​a​​1​​∫√​ax+b​​​dx−​a​​b​​∫​√​ax+b​​​​​1​​dx​=​a​2​​​​1​​∫√​ax+b​​​d(ax+b)−​a​2​​​​b​​∫​√​ax+b​​​​​1​​d(ax+b)​=​3a​2​​​​2​​(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​−​a​2​​​​2b​​√​ax+b​​​+C​​

14.∫x2ax+bdx=215a3(3a2x2−4abx+8b2)ax+b+C\begin{aligned} 14.\int\frac{x^2}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\,dx=\frac{2}{15a^3}(3a^2x^2-4abx+8b^2)\sqrt{ax+b}+C \end{aligned}​14.∫​√​ax+b​​​​​x​2​​​​dx=​15a​3​​​​2​​(3a​2​​x​2​​−4abx+8b​2​​)√​ax+b​​​+C​​

∫x2ax+bdx=1a2∫(ax+b)2−2b(ax+b)+b2ax+bdx=1a2∫(ax+b)32dx−2ba2∫(ax+b)12dx+b2a2∫dxax+b=1a3∫(ax+b)32d(ax+b)−2ba3∫(ax+b)12d(ax+b)+b2a3∫d(ax+b)ax+b=25a3⋅(ax+b)52−4b3a3⋅(ax+b)32−2b2a3(ax+b)12+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x^2}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a^2}\int\frac{(ax+b)^2-2b(ax+b)+b^2}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\int(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\,dx-\frac{2b}{a^2}\int(ax+b)^\frac{1}{2}\,dx+\frac{b^2}{a^2}\int\frac{dx}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\\ &=\frac{1}{a^3}\int(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}\,d(ax+b)-\frac{2b}{a^3}\int(ax+b)^\frac{1}{2}\,d(ax+b)+\frac{b^2}{a^3}\int\frac{d(ax+b)}{\sqrt{ax+b}}\\ &=\frac{2}{5a^3}\cdot(ax+b)^\frac{5}{2}-\frac{4b}{3a^3}\cdot(ax+b)^\frac{3}{2}-\frac{2b^2}{a^3}(ax+b)^\frac{1}{2}+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​√​ax+b​​​​​x​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​=​a​2​​​​1​​∫​√​ax+b​​​​​(ax+b)​2​​−2b(ax+b)+b​2​​​​dx​=​a​2​​​​1​​∫(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​dx−​a​2​​​​2b​​∫(ax+b)​​2​​1​​​​dx+​a​2​​​​b​2​​​​∫​√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​=​a​3​​​​1​​∫(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​d(ax+b)−​a​3​​​​2b​​∫(ax+b)​​2​​1​​​​d(ax+b)+​a​3​​​​b​2​​​​∫​√​ax+b​​​​​d(ax+b)​​​=​5a​3​​​​2​​⋅(ax+b)​​2​​5​​​​−​3a​3​​​​4b​​⋅(ax+b)​​2​​3​​​​−​a​3​​​​2b​2​​​​(ax+b)​​2​​1​​​​+C​​

15.∫dxxax+b={1bln∣ax+b−bax+b+b∣+C(b>0)2−barctanax+b−b+C(b<0)\begin{aligned} 15.\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}= \begin{cases} \frac{1}{\sqrt{b}}\ln\left\vert\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}-\sqrt{b}}{\sqrt{ax+b}+\sqrt{b}}\right\vert+C &(b>0)\\ \frac{2}{\sqrt{-b}}\arctan{\sqrt{\frac{ax+b}{-b}}}+C &(b<0) \end{cases} \end{aligned}​15.∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​=​⎩​⎨​⎧​​​​√​b​​​​​1​​ln​∣​∣​∣​​​√​ax+b​​​+√​b​​​​​√​ax+b​​​−√​b​​​​​​∣​∣​∣​​+C​​√​−b​​​​​2​​arctan√​​−b​​ax+b​​​​​+C​​​(b>0)​(b<0)​​​​

令ax+b=μ\sqrt{ax+b}=\mu√​ax+b​​​=μ，则dx=2μadμdx=\frac{2\mu}{a}d\mudx=​a​​2μ​​dμ

故有：∫dxxax+b=2∫dμμ2−b\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}=2\int\frac{d\mu}{\mu^2-b} \end{aligned}​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​=2∫​μ​2​​−b​​dμ​​​​

当b>0b>0b>0时：

∫dxxax+b=2∫dμμ2−b=1b∫(1μ−b−1μ+b)dμ=1b(∫d(μ−b)μ−b−∫d(μ+b)μ+b)=1b(ln∣μ−b∣−ln∣μ+b∣)+C=1bln∣μ−bμ−b∣+C=1bln∣ax+b−bax+b+b∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}&=2\int\frac{d\mu}{\mu^2-b}\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{b}}\int\left( \frac{1}{\mu-\sqrt{b}}-\frac{1}{\mu+\sqrt{b}} \right)\,d\mu\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{b}}\left( \int\frac{d(\mu-\sqrt{b})}{\mu-\sqrt{b}}-\int\frac{d(\mu+\sqrt{b})}{\mu+\sqrt{b}} \right)\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{b}}\left( \ln\vert\mu-\sqrt{b}\vert-\ln\vert\mu+\sqrt{b}\vert \right)+C\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{b}}\ln\left\vert\frac{\mu-\sqrt{b}}{\mu-\sqrt{b}}\right\vert+C\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{b}}\ln\left\vert\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}-\sqrt{b}}{\sqrt{ax+b}+\sqrt{b}}\right\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​=2∫​μ​2​​−b​​dμ​​​=​√​b​​​​​1​​∫(​μ−√​b​​​​​1​​−​μ+√​b​​​​​1​​)dμ​=​√​b​​​​​1​​(∫​μ−√​b​​​​​d(μ−√​b​​​)​​−∫​μ+√​b​​​​​d(μ+√​b​​​)​​)​=​√​b​​​​​1​​(ln∣μ−√​b​​​∣−ln∣μ+√​b​​​∣)+C​=​√​b​​​​​1​​ln​∣​∣​∣​∣​∣​​​μ−√​b​​​​​μ−√​b​​​​​​∣​∣​∣​∣​∣​​+C​=​√​b​​​​​1​​ln​∣​∣​∣​∣​∣​​​√​ax+b​​​+√​b​​​​​√​ax+b​​​−√​b​​​​​​∣​∣​∣​∣​∣​​+C​​

当b<0b<0b<0时：

∫dxxax+b=2∫dμμ2+b=2∫dμμ2+(−b)2=2(−b)∫d(μ−b)(μ−b)2+1=2(−b)arctanμ−b+C=2(−b)arctanax+b−b+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}&=2\int\frac{d\mu}{\mu^2+b}\\ &=2\int\frac{d\mu}{\mu^2+(\sqrt{-b})^2}\\ &=\frac{2}{\sqrt{(-b)}}\int\frac{d\left(\frac{\mu}{\sqrt{-b}}\right)}{\left(\frac{\mu}{\sqrt{-b}}\right)^2+1}\\ &=\frac{2}{\sqrt{(-b)}}\arctan{\frac{\mu}{\sqrt{-b}}}+C\\ &=\frac{2}{\sqrt{(-b)}}\arctan{\sqrt{\frac{ax+b}{-b}}}+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​=2∫​μ​2​​+b​​dμ​​​=2∫​μ​2​​+(√​−b​​​)​2​​​​dμ​​​=​√​(−b)​​​​​2​​∫​(​√​−b​​​​​μ​​)​2​​+1​​d(​√​−b​​​​​μ​​)​​​=​√​(−b)​​​​​2​​arctan​√​−b​​​​​μ​​+C​=​√​(−b)​​​​​2​​arctan√​​−b​​ax+b​​​​​+C​​

16.∫dxx2ax+b=−ax+bbx−a2b∫dxxax+b\begin{aligned} 16.\int\frac{dx}{x^2\sqrt{ax+b}}=-\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{bx}-\frac{a}{2b}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}\\ \end{aligned}​16.∫​x​2​​√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​=−​bx​​√​ax+b​​​​​−​2b​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​​

设1x2ax+b=Axax+b+Bax+bx2\begin{aligned} \frac{1}{x^2\sqrt{ax+b}}=\frac{A}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}+\frac{B\sqrt{ax+b}}{x^2} \end{aligned}​​x​2​​√​ax+b​​​​​1​​=​x√​ax+b​​​​​A​​+​x​2​​​​B√​ax+b​​​​​​​，则可解得：{A=−abB=1b\begin{aligned} \begin{cases} A=-\frac{a}{b}\\ B=\frac{1}{b} \end{cases} \end{aligned}​{​A=−​b​​a​​​B=​b​​1​​​​​​

∫dxx2ax+b=−ab∫dxxax+b+1b∫ax+bx2dx=−ab∫dxxax+b−1b∫ax+bd1x=−ab∫dxxax+b−ax+bbx+1b∫1xa2⋅(ax+b)−12dx=−ab∫dxxax+b−ax+bbx+a2b∫dxxax+b=−ax+bbx−a2b∫dxxax+b\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x^2\sqrt{ax+b}}&=-\frac{a}{b}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}+\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x^2}\,dx\\ &=-\frac{a}{b}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}-\frac{1}{b}\int\sqrt{ax+b}\,d\frac{1}{x}\\ &=-\frac{a}{b}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}-\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{bx}+\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{1}{x}\frac{a}{2}\cdot(ax+b)^{-\frac{1}{2}}\,dx\\ &=-\frac{a}{b}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}-\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{bx}+\frac{a}{2b}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}\\ &=-\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{bx}-\frac{a}{2b}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}} \end{aligned} ​∫​x​2​​√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​=−​b​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​+​b​​1​​∫​x​2​​​​√​ax+b​​​​​dx​=−​b​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​−​b​​1​​∫√​ax+b​​​d​x​​1​​​=−​b​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​−​bx​​√​ax+b​​​​​+​b​​1​​∫​x​​1​​​2​​a​​⋅(ax+b)​−​2​​1​​​​dx​=−​b​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​−​bx​​√​ax+b​​​​​+​2b​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​=−​bx​​√​ax+b​​​​​−​2b​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​

17.∫ax+bxdx=2ax+b+b∫dxxax+b\begin{aligned} 17.\int\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x}\,dx=2\sqrt{ax+b}+b\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}} \end{aligned}​17.∫​x​​√​ax+b​​​​​dx=2√​ax+b​​​+b∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​

令ax+b=μ\sqrt{ax+b}=\mu√​ax+b​​​=μ，则dx=2μadμdx=\frac{2\mu}{a}d\mudx=​a​​2μ​​dμ

故有：∫ax+bxdx=∫2μ2μ2−bdμ\begin{aligned} \int\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x}\,dx=\int\frac{2\mu^2}{\mu^2-b}\,d\mu \end{aligned}​∫​x​​√​ax+b​​​​​dx=∫​μ​2​​−b​​2μ​2​​​​dμ​​

∫ax+bxdx=2∫μ2μ2−bdμ=2∫μ2−b+bμ2−bdμ=2∫dμ+2b∫dμμ2−b=2μ+2b∫dμμ2−b=2ax+b+b∫dxxax+b\begin{aligned} \int\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x}\,dx&=2\int\frac{\mu^2}{\mu^2-b}\,d\mu\\ &=2\int\frac{\mu^2-b+b}{\mu^2-b}\,d\mu\\ &=2\int d\mu+2b\int\frac{d\mu}{\mu^2-b}\\ &=2\mu+2b\int\frac{d\mu}{\mu^2-b}\\ &=2\sqrt{ax+b}+b\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}} \end{aligned} ​∫​x​​√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​​​​=2∫​μ​2​​−b​​μ​2​​​​dμ​=2∫​μ​2​​−b​​μ​2​​−b+b​​dμ​=2∫dμ+2b∫​μ​2​​−b​​dμ​​​=2μ+2b∫​μ​2​​−b​​dμ​​​=2√​ax+b​​​+b∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​

18.∫ax+bx2dx=−ax+bx+a2∫dxxax+b\begin{aligned} 18.\int\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x^2}\,dx=-\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x}+\frac{a}{2}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}} \end{aligned}​18.∫​x​2​​​​√​ax+b​​​​​dx=−​x​​√​ax+b​​​​​+​2​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​

∫ax+bx2dx=−∫ax+bd1x=−ax+bx+∫1xd(ax+b)=−ax+bx+a2∫dxxax+b\begin{aligned} \int\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x^2}\,dx&=-\int\sqrt{ax+b}\,d\frac{1}{x}\\ &=-\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x}+\int\frac{1}{x}\,d(\sqrt{ax+b})\\ &=-\frac{\sqrt{ax+b}}{x}+\frac{a}{2}\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{ax+b}}\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​x​2​​​​√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​​​=−∫√​ax+b​​​d​x​​1​​​=−​x​​√​ax+b​​​​​+∫​x​​1​​d(√​ax+b​​​)​=−​x​​√​ax+b​​​​​+​2​​a​​∫​x√​ax+b​​​​​dx​​​​

含有x2±a2x^2 \pm a^2x​2​​±a​2​​的积分

19.∫dxx2+a2=1aarctanxa+C\begin{aligned} 19.\int\frac{dx}{x^2+a^2}=\frac{1}{a}\arctan{\frac{x}{a}}+C \end{aligned}​19.∫​x​2​​+a​2​​​​dx​​=​a​​1​​arctan​a​​x​​+C​​

∫dxx2+a2=1a∫d(xa)(xa)2+1=1aarctanxa+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x^2+a^2}&=\frac{1}{a}\int\frac{d(\frac{x}{a})}{(\frac{x}{a})^2+1}\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\arctan{x}{a}+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​x​2​​+a​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​=​a​​1​​∫​(​a​​x​​)​2​​+1​​d(​a​​x​​)​​​=​a​​1​​arctanxa+C​​

20.∫dx(x2+a2)n=x2(n−1)a2(x2+a2)n−1+2n−32(n−1)a2∫dx(x2+a2)n−1\begin{aligned} 20.\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^n}=\frac{x}{2(n-1)a^2(x^2+a^2)^{n-1}}+\frac{2n-3}{2(n-1)a^2}\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n-1}} \end{aligned}​20.∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​dx​​=​2(n−1)a​2​​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n−1​​​​x​​+​2(n−1)a​2​​​​2n−3​​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n−1​​​​dx​​​​

∫dx(x2+a2)n=x(x2+a2)n−∫xd[1(x2+a2)n]=x(x2+a2)n+2n∫x2(x2+a2)n+1dx=x(x2+a2)n+2n∫x2+a2−a2(x2+a2)n+1dx=x(x2+a2)n+2n∫dx(x2+a2)ndx−2na2∫dx(x2+a2)n+1\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^n}&=\frac{x}{(x^2+a^2)^n}-\int x\,d\left[\frac{1}{(x^2+a^2)^n}\right]\\ &=\frac{x}{(x^2+a^2)^n}+2n\int\frac{x^2}{(x^2+a^2)^{n+1}}\,dx\\ &=\frac{x}{(x^2+a^2)^n}+2n\int\frac{x^2+a^2-a^2}{(x^2+a^2)^{n+1}}\,dx\\ &=\frac{x}{(x^2+a^2)^n}+2n\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n}}\,dx-2na^2\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n+1}}\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​=​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​x​​−∫xd[​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​1​​]​=​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​x​​+2n∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n+1​​​​x​2​​​​dx​=​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​x​​+2n∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n+1​​​​x​2​​+a​2​​−a​2​​​​dx​=​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​x​​+2n∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​dx​​dx−2na​2​​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n+1​​​​dx​​​​

所以可得：

∫dx(x2+a2)n=x(x2+a2)n+2n∫dx(x2+a2)ndx−2na2∫dx(x2+a2)n+12na2∫dx(x2+a2)n+1=x(x2+a2)n−(1−2n)∫dx(x2+a2)n∫dx(x2+a2)n+1=x2na2(x2+a2)n−(1−2n)2na2∫dx(x2+a2)n\begin{aligned} &\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^n}=\frac{x}{(x^2+a^2)^n}+2n\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n}}\,dx-2na^2\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n+1}}\\ &2na^2\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n+1}}=\frac{x}{(x^2+a^2)^n}-(1-2n)\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^n}\\ &\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n+1}}=\frac{x}{2na^2(x^2+a^2)^n}-\frac{(1-2n)}{2na^2}\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^n} \end{aligned} ​​​​​​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​dx​​=​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​x​​+2n∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​dx​​dx−2na​2​​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n+1​​​​dx​​​2na​2​​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n+1​​​​dx​​=​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​x​​−(1−2n)∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​dx​​​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n+1​​​​dx​​=​2na​2​​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​x​​−​2na​2​​​​(1−2n)​​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​dx​​​​

将nnn换为n−1n-1n−1可得：

∫dx(x2+a2)n=x2a2(n−1)(x2+a2)n−1−(3−2n)2(n−1)a2∫dx(x2+a2)n−1\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n}}=\frac{x}{2a^2(n-1)(x^2+a^2)^{n-1}}-\frac{(3-2n)}{2(n-1)a^2}\int\frac{dx}{(x^2+a^2)^{n-1}} \end{aligned} ​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n​​​​dx​​=​2a​2​​(n−1)(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n−1​​​​x​​−​2(n−1)a​2​​​​(3−2n)​​∫​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​n−1​​​​dx​​​​

21.∫dxx2−a2=12aln∣x−ax+a∣+C\begin{aligned} 21.\int\frac{dx}{x^2-a^2}=\frac{1}{2a}\ln\left\vert\frac{x-a}{x+a}\right\vert+C \end{aligned}​21.∫​x​2​​−a​2​​​​dx​​=​2a​​1​​ln​∣​∣​​​x+a​​x−a​​​∣​∣​​+C​​

∫dxx2−a2=12a∫(1x−a−1x+a)dx=12a(∫d(x−a)x−a−∫d(x+a)x+a)=12a(ln∣x−a∣−ln∣x+a∣)+C=12aln∣x−ax+a∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x^2-a^2}&=\frac{1}{2a}\int\left(\frac{1}{x-a}-\frac{1}{x+a}\right)\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\left(\int\frac{d(x-a)}{x-a}-\int\frac{d(x+a)}{x+a}\right)\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\left(\ln\vert x-a\vert-\ln\vert x+a\vert\right)+C\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\ln\left\vert\frac{x-a}{x+a}\right\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x​2​​−a​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​​=​2a​​1​​∫(​x−a​​1​​−​x+a​​1​​)dx​=​2a​​1​​(∫​x−a​​d(x−a)​​−∫​x+a​​d(x+a)​​)​=​2a​​1​​(ln∣x−a∣−ln∣x+a∣)+C​=​2a​​1​​ln​∣​∣​∣​∣​​​x+a​​x−a​​​∣​∣​∣​∣​​+C​​

含有ax2+b(a>0)ax^2+b(a>0)ax​2​​+b(a>0)的积分

22.∫dxax2+b={1abarctanabx+C(b>0)12−abln∣ax−−bax+−b∣+C(b<0)22.\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{ax^2+b}= \begin{cases} \frac{1}{\sqrt{ab}}\arctan \sqrt{\frac{a}{b}}x+C&(b>0)\\ \frac{1}{2\sqrt{-ab}}\ln\left\vert\frac{\sqrt{a}x-\sqrt{-b}}{\sqrt{a}x+\sqrt{-b}}\right\vert+C&(b<0)\\ \end{cases} \end{aligned}22.​∫​ax​2​​+b​​dx​​=​⎩​⎪​⎪​⎨​⎪​⎪​⎧​​​​√​ab​​​​​1​​arctan√​​b​​a​​​​​x+C​​2√​−ab​​​​​1​​ln​∣​∣​∣​​​√​a​​​x+√​−b​​​​​√​a​​​x−√​−b​​​​​​∣​∣​∣​​+C​​​​(b>0)​(b<0)​​​​

当b>0b>0b>0时：

∫dxax2+b=1b∫dxax2b+1=1ab∫d(abx)(abx)2+1=1abarctanabx+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{ax^2+b}&=\frac{1}{b}\int\frac{dx}{\frac{ax^2}{b}+1}\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{ab}}\int\frac{d(\sqrt{\frac{a}{b}}x)}{(\sqrt{\frac{a}{b}}x)^2+1}\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{ab}}\arctan \sqrt{\frac{a}{b}}x+C \end{aligned} ​∫​ax​2​​+b​​dx​​​​​​​=​b​​1​​∫​​b​​ax​2​​​​+1​​dx​​​=​√​ab​​​​​1​​∫​(√​​b​​a​​​​​x)​2​​+1​​d(√​​b​​a​​​​​x)​​​=​√​ab​​​​​1​​arctan√​​b​​a​​​​​x+C​​

当b<0b<0b<0时：

∫dxax2+b=∫dxax2−(−b)=∫dx(ax)2−(−b)2=12−b∫(1ax−−b−1ax+−b)dx=12−ab(∫d(ax−−b)(ax)−(−b)−d(ax−−b)(ax)+(−b))=12−ab(ln∣a−−b∣−ln∣a−−b∣)+C=12−abln∣ax−−bax+−b∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{ax^2+b}&=\int\frac{dx}{ax^2-(-b)}\\ &=\int\frac{dx}{(\sqrt{a}x)^2-(\sqrt{-b})^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{2\sqrt{-b}}\int\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{a}x-\sqrt{-b}}-\frac{1}{\sqrt{a}x+\sqrt{-b}}\right)\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{2\sqrt{-ab}}\left(\int\frac{d(\sqrt{a}x-\sqrt{-b})}{(\sqrt{a}x)-(\sqrt{-b})}-\frac{d(\sqrt{a}x-\sqrt{-b})}{(\sqrt{a}x)+(\sqrt{-b})}\right)\\ &=\frac{1}{2\sqrt{-ab}}\left(\ln\vert\sqrt{a}-\sqrt{-b}\vert-\ln\vert\sqrt{a}-\sqrt{-b}\vert\right)+C\\ &=\frac{1}{2\sqrt{-ab}}\ln\left\vert\frac{\sqrt{a}x-\sqrt{-b}}{\sqrt{a}x+\sqrt{-b}}\right\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​ax​2​​+b​​dx​​​​​​​​​​=∫​ax​2​​−(−b)​​dx​​​=∫​(√​a​​​x)​2​​−(√​−b​​​)​2​​​​dx​​​=​2√​−b​​​​​1​​∫(​√​a​​​x−√​−b​​​​​1​​−​√​a​​​x+√​−b​​​​​1​​)dx​=​2√​−ab​​​​​1​​(∫​(√​a​​​x)−(√​−b​​​)​​d(√​a​​​x−√​−b​​​)​​−​(√​a​​​x)+(√​−b​​​)​​d(√​a​​​x−√​−b​​​)​​)​=​2√​−ab​​​​​1​​(ln∣√​a​​​−√​−b​​​∣−ln∣√​a​​​−√​−b​​​∣)+C​=​2√​−ab​​​​​1​​ln​∣​∣​∣​∣​​​√​a​​​x+√​−b​​​​​√​a​​​x−√​−b​​​​​​∣​∣​∣​∣​​+C​​

23.∫xax2+bdx=12aln∣ax2+b∣+C\begin{aligned} 23.\int\frac{x}{ax^2+b}\,dx=\frac{1}{2a}\ln\vert ax^2+b\vert+C \end{aligned}​23.∫​ax​2​​+b​​x​​dx=​2a​​1​​ln∣ax​2​​+b∣+C​​

∫xax2+bdx=12∫dx2ax2+b=12a∫d(ax2+b)ax2+b=12aln∣ax2+b∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x}{ax^2+b}\,dx&=\frac{1}{2}\int\frac{dx^2}{ax^2+b}\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\int\frac{d(ax^2+b)}{ax^2+b}\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\ln\vert ax^2+b\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​ax​2​​+b​​x​​dx​​​​​=​2​​1​​∫​ax​2​​+b​​dx​2​​​​​=​2a​​1​​∫​ax​2​​+b​​d(ax​2​​+b)​​​=​2a​​1​​ln∣ax​2​​+b∣+C​​

24.∫x2ax2+bdx=xa−ba∫dxax2+b\begin{aligned} 24.\int\frac{x^2}{ax^2+b}\,dx=\frac{x}{a}-\frac{b}{a}\int\frac{dx}{ax^2+b} \end{aligned}​24.∫​ax​2​​+b​​x​2​​​​dx=​a​​x​​−​a​​b​​∫​ax​2​​+b​​dx​​​​

∫x2ax2+bdx=1a∫ax2+b−bax2+bdx=1a(∫dx−∫bax2+bdx)=xa−ba∫dxax2+b\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x^2}{ax^2+b}\,dx&=\frac{1}{a}\int\frac{ax^2+b-b}{ax^2+b}\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\left( \int dx-\int\frac{b}{ax^2+b}\,dx \right)\\ &=\frac{x}{a}-\frac{b}{a}\int\frac{dx}{ax^2+b}\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​ax​2​​+b​​x​2​​​​dx​​​​​​=​a​​1​​∫​ax​2​​+b​​ax​2​​+b−b​​dx​=​a​​1​​(∫dx−∫​ax​2​​+b​​b​​dx)​=​a​​x​​−​a​​b​​∫​ax​2​​+b​​dx​​​​

25.∫dxx(ax2+b)=12blnx2∣ax2+b∣+C\begin{aligned} 25.\int\frac{dx}{x(ax^2+b)}=\frac{1}{2b}\ln\frac{x^2}{\vert ax^2+b\vert}+C \end{aligned}​25.∫​x(ax​2​​+b)​​dx​​=​2b​​1​​ln​∣ax​2​​+b∣​​x​2​​​​+C​​

∫dxx(ax2+b)==12blnx2∣ax2+b∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x(ax^2+b)}&=\\ &=\frac{1}{2b}\ln\frac{x^2}{\vert ax^2+b\vert}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x(ax​2​​+b)​​dx​​​​​​=​=​2b​​1​​ln​∣ax​2​​+b∣​​x​2​​​​+C​​

含有ax2+bx+c(a>0)ax^2+bx+c(a>0)ax​2​​+bx+c(a>0)的积分

含有x2+a2(a>0)\sqrt{x^2+a^2}(a>0)√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​(a>0)的积分

31.∫dxx2+a2=arshxa+C1=ln(x+x2+a2)+C\begin{aligned} 31.\int\frac{dx}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}=arsh\frac{x}{a}+C_1=\ln(x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2})+C \end{aligned}​31.∫​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx​​=arsh​a​​x​​+C​1​​=ln(x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​)+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫dxx2+a2=∫dxy=∫d(x+y)x+y=ln∣x+y∣+C=ln∣x+x2+a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}&=\int\frac{dx}{y}\\ &=\int\frac{d(x+y)}{x+y}\\ &=\ln{\vert x+y\vert}+C\\ &=\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​=∫​y​​dx​​​=∫​x+y​​d(x+y)​​​=ln∣x+y∣+C​=ln∣x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

32.∫dx(x2+a2)3=xa2x2+a2+C\begin{aligned} 32.\int\frac{dx}{\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}}=\frac{x}{a^2\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}+C \end{aligned}​32.∫​√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​dx​​=​a​2​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​x​​+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫dx(x2+a2)3=∫dxy3=∫1y2⋅ydx−xdyy2−x2=∫1y2y2d(xy)y2−x2=∫d(xy)a2=1a2⋅xy+C=xa2x2+a2+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}}&=\int\frac{dx}{y^3}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{y^2}\cdot\frac{ydx-xdy}{y^2-x^2}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{y^2}\frac{y^2d(\frac{x}{y})}{y^2-x^2}\\ &=\int\frac{d(\frac{x}{y})}{a^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\cdot\frac{x}{y}+C\\ &=\frac{x}{a^2\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​=∫​y​3​​​​dx​​​=∫​y​2​​​​1​​⋅​y​2​​−x​2​​​​ydx−xdy​​​=∫​y​2​​​​1​​​y​2​​−x​2​​​​y​2​​d(​y​​x​​)​​​=∫​a​2​​​​d(​y​​x​​)​​​=​a​2​​​​1​​⋅​y​​x​​+C​=​a​2​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​x​​+C​​

33.∫xx2+a2dx=x2+a2+C\begin{aligned} 33.\int\frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}\,dx=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+C \end{aligned}​33.∫​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​x​​dx=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫xx2+a2dx=∫xdxy=∫ydyy=y+C=x2+a2+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}\,dx&=\int\frac{xdx}{y}\\ &=\int\frac{ydy}{y}\\ &=y+C\\ &=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​x​​dx​​​​​​=∫​y​​xdx​​​=∫​y​​ydy​​​=y+C​=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+C​​

34.∫x(x2+a2)3dx=−1x2+a2+C\begin{aligned} 34.\int\frac{x}{\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}}\,dx=-\frac{1}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}+C \end{aligned}​34.∫​√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​x​​dx=−​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​1​​+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x(x2+a2)3dx=∫xdxy3=∫ydyy3=∫dyy2=−1y+C=−1x2+a2+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x}{\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}}\,dx&=\int\frac{xdx}{y^3}\\ &=\int\frac{ydy}{y^3}\\ &=\int\frac{dy}{y^2}\\ &=-\frac{1}{y}+C\\ &=-\frac{1}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫​√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​x​​dx​​​​​​​​=∫​y​3​​​​xdx​​​=∫​y​3​​​​ydy​​​=∫​y​2​​​​dy​​​=−​y​​1​​+C​=−​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​1​​+C​​

35.∫x2x2+a2dx=x2x2+a2−a22ln(x+x2+a2)+C\begin{aligned} 35.\int\frac{x^2}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}\,dx=\frac{x}{2}\sqrt{x^2+a^2}-\frac{a^2}{2}\ln(x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2})+C \end{aligned}​35.∫​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​x​2​​​​dx=​2​​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​−​2​​a​2​​​​ln(x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​)+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2x2+a2dx=∫x2dxy=∫xydyy=∫xdy=12∫xdy+ydx+xdy−ydx=12(∫(xdy+ydx)+a2∫xdy−ydxy2−x2)=12(∫d(xy)−a2∫dxy)=xy2−a22ln∣x+y∣+C=x2x2+a2−a22ln∣x+x2+a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x^2}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}\,dx&=\int\frac{x^2dx}{y}\\ &=\int\frac{xydy}{y}\\ &=\int x\,dy\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int xdy+ydx+xdy-ydx\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\left(\int (xdy+ydx)+a^2\int\frac{xdy-ydx}{y^2-x^2}\right)\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\left(\int d(xy)-a^2\int\frac{dx}{y}\right)\\ &=\frac{xy}{2}-\frac{a^2}{2}\ln \vert x+y\vert+C\\ &=\frac{x}{2}\sqrt{x^2+a^2}-\frac{a^2}{2}\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​x​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​=∫​y​​x​2​​dx​​​=∫​y​​xydy​​​=∫xdy​=​2​​1​​∫xdy+ydx+xdy−ydx​=​2​​1​​(∫(xdy+ydx)+a​2​​∫​y​2​​−x​2​​​​xdy−ydx​​)​=​2​​1​​(∫d(xy)−a​2​​∫​y​​dx​​)​=​2​​xy​​−​2​​a​2​​​​ln∣x+y∣+C​=​2​​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​−​2​​a​2​​​​ln∣x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

36.∫x2(x2+a2)3dx=−xx2+a2+ln(x+x2+a2)+C\begin{aligned} 36.\int\frac{x^2}{\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}}\,dx=-\frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}+\ln(x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2})+C \end{aligned}​36.∫​√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​x​2​​​​dx=−​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​x​​+ln(x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​)+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2(x2+a2)3dx=∫(y2−a2)dxy3=∫dxy−a2∫dxy3=ln∣x+y∣−a2∫1y2⋅ydx−xdyy2−x2=ln∣x+y∣−a2∫1y2⋅y2d(xy)a2=ln∣x+y∣−xy+C=ln∣x+x2+a2∣−xx2+a2+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{x^2}{\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}}\,dx&=\int\frac{(y^2-a^2)dx}{y^3}\\ &=\int\frac{dx}{y}-a^2\int\frac{dx}{y^3}\\ &=\ln\vert x+y\vert-a^2\int\frac{1}{y^2}\cdot\frac{ydx-xdy}{y^2-x^2}\\ &=\ln\vert x+y\vert-a^2\int\frac{1}{y^2}\cdot\frac{y^2d(\frac{x}{y})}{a^2}\\ &=\ln\vert x+y\vert-\frac{x}{y}+C\\ &=\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\vert-\frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​x​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​​=∫​y​3​​​​(y​2​​−a​2​​)dx​​​=∫​y​​dx​​−a​2​​∫​y​3​​​​dx​​​=ln∣x+y∣−a​2​​∫​y​2​​​​1​​⋅​y​2​​−x​2​​​​ydx−xdy​​​=ln∣x+y∣−a​2​​∫​y​2​​​​1​​⋅​a​2​​​​y​2​​d(​y​​x​​)​​​=ln∣x+y∣−​y​​x​​+C​=ln∣x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​∣−​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​x​​+C​​

37.∫dxxx2+a2=1alnx2+a2−a∣x∣+C\begin{aligned} 37.\int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}=\frac{1}{a}\ln \frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}-a}{\vert x\vert}+C \end{aligned}​37.∫​x√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx​​=​a​​1​​ln​∣x∣​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​−a​​+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫dxxx2+a2=∫dxxy=∫dyx2=∫dyy2−a2=12a∫(1y−a−1y+a)dy=12a(ln∣y−a∣−ln∣y+a∣)+C=12a(ln∣y−ay+a∣)+C=12a(ln∣(y−a)2y2−a2∣)+C=1alnx2+a2−a∣x∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}&=\int\frac{dx}{xy}\\ &=\int\frac{dy}{x^2}\\ &=\int\frac{dy}{y^2-a^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\int\left(\frac{1}{y-a}-\frac{1}{y+a}\right)dy\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\left(\ln \vert y-a\vert-\ln\vert y+a\vert\right)+C\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\left(\ln \vert \frac{y-a}{y+a}\vert\right)+C\\ &=\frac{1}{2a}\left(\ln \vert \frac{(y-a)^2}{y^2-a^2}\vert\right)+C\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\ln \frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}-a}{\vert x\vert}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​​​=∫​xy​​dx​​​=∫​x​2​​​​dy​​​=∫​y​2​​−a​2​​​​dy​​​=​2a​​1​​∫(​y−a​​1​​−​y+a​​1​​)dy​=​2a​​1​​(ln∣y−a∣−ln∣y+a∣)+C​=​2a​​1​​(ln∣​y+a​​y−a​​∣)+C​=​2a​​1​​(ln∣​y​2​​−a​2​​​​(y−a)​2​​​​∣)+C​=​a​​1​​ln​∣x∣​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​−a​​+C​​

38.∫dxx2x2+a2=−x2+a2a2x+C\begin{aligned} 38.\int\frac{dx}{x^2\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}=-\frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}{a^2x}+C \end{aligned}​38.∫​x​2​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx​​=−​a​2​​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫dxx2x2+a2=∫dxx2y=∫1x2⋅ydx−xdyy2−x2=∫1x2⋅−x2dyxy2−x2=−1a2∫dyx=−1a2⋅yx+C=−x2+a2a2x+C\begin{aligned} \int\frac{dx}{x^2\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}&=\int\frac{dx}{x^2y}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{x^2}\cdot\frac{ydx-xdy}{y^2-x^2}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{x^2}\cdot\frac{-x^2d\frac{y}{x}}{y^2-x^2}\\ &=-\frac{1}{a^2}\int d\frac{y}{x}\\ &=-\frac{1}{a^2}\cdot\frac{y}{x}+C\\ &=-\frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}{a^2x}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x​2​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​=∫​x​2​​y​​dx​​​=∫​x​2​​​​1​​⋅​y​2​​−x​2​​​​ydx−xdy​​​=∫​x​2​​​​1​​⋅​y​2​​−x​2​​​​−x​2​​d​x​​y​​​​​=−​a​2​​​​1​​∫d​x​​y​​​=−​a​2​​​​1​​⋅​x​​y​​+C​=−​a​2​​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​+C​​

39.∫x2+a2dx=x2x2+a2+a22ln(x+x2+a2)+C\begin{aligned} 39.\int\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\,dx = \frac{x}{2}\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+\frac{a^2}{2}\ln(x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2})+C \end{aligned}​39.∫√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​dx=​2​​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+​2​​a​2​​​​ln(x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​)+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2+a2dx=∫ydx=12∫(ydx+xdy)+(ydx−xdy)=12∫d(xy)+a22∫ydx−xdyy2−x2=12∫d(xy)+a22∫dxy=xy2+a22ln∣x+y∣+C=x2x2+a2+a22ln(x+x2+a2)+C\begin{aligned} \int\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\,dx&=\int y\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int(y\,dx+x\,dy)+(y\,dx-x\,dy)\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int d(xy)+\frac{a^2}{2}\int\frac{y\,dx-x\,dy}{y^2-x^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int d(xy)+\frac{a^2}{2}\int\frac{dx}{y}\\ &=\frac{xy}{2}+\frac{a^2}{2}\ln\vert x+y\vert+C\\ &=\frac{x}{2}\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+\frac{a^2}{2}\ln(x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2})+C \end{aligned} ​∫√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​=∫ydx​=​2​​1​​∫(ydx+xdy)+(ydx−xdy)​=​2​​1​​∫d(xy)+​2​​a​2​​​​∫​y​2​​−x​2​​​​ydx−xdy​​​=​2​​1​​∫d(xy)+​2​​a​2​​​​∫​y​​dx​​​=​2​​xy​​+​2​​a​2​​​​ln∣x+y∣+C​=​2​​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+​2​​a​2​​​​ln(x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​)+C​​

40.∫(x2+a2)3dx=x8(2x2+5a2)x2+a2+3a48ln(x+x2+a2)+C\begin{aligned} 40.\int\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}\,dx = \frac{x}{8}(2x^2+5a^2)\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+\frac{3a^4}{8}\ln(x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2})+C \end{aligned}​40.∫√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​dx=​8​​x​​(2x​2​​+5a​2​​)√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+​8​​3a​4​​​​ln(x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​)+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫(x2+a2)3dx=∫y3dx=xy3−∫xdy3=xy3−3∫y2xdy=xy3−3∫(x2+a2)xdy=xy3−3a2∫xdy−3∫x3dy=xy3−3a2xy+3a2∫ydx−3∫x3dy=xy3−3a2xy+3∫(y3−x2y)dx−3∫x3dy=xy3−3a2xy+3∫y3dx−3∫(y2−a2)ydx−3∫(y2−a2)xdy=xy3−3a2xy+3a2∫ydx+3a2∫xdy−3∫y2xdy=xy3−3a2xy+3a2∫ydx+3a2∫xdy−3∫y(y2−a2)dx=xy3−3a2xy+3a2∫ydx+3a2∫xdy−3∫y3dx+3a2∫ydx=xy3−3a2xy+6a2∫ydx+3a2∫xdy−3∫y3dx=xy3−3a2xy+3a2∫d(xy)+3a4∫dyx+3a22∫d(xy)−3a42∫dyx−3∫y3dx=xy3+3a22xy+3a42∫dxy−3∫y3d=xy34+3a28xy+3a48ln∣x+y∣+C=x(x2+a2)34+3a28xx2+a2+3a48ln∣x+x2+a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}\,dx &=\int y^3dx \\ &=xy^3-\int x\,dy^3\\ &=xy^3-3\int y^2x\,dy\\ &=xy^3-3\int(x^2+a^2)x\,dy\\ &=xy^3-3a^2\int x\,dy-3\int x^3\,dy\\ &=xy^3-3a^2xy+3a^2\int y\,dx-3\int x^3\,dy\\ &=xy^3-3a^2xy+3\int (y^3-x^2y)\,dx-3\int x^3\,dy\\ &=xy^3-3a^2xy+3\int y^3dx-3\int (y^2-a^2)y\,dx-3\int (y^2-a^2)x\,dy\\ &=xy^3-3a^2xy+3a^2\int y\,dx+3a^2\int x\,dy-3\int y^2x\,dy\\ &=xy^3-3a^2xy+3a^2\int y\,dx+3a^2\int x\,dy-3\int y(y^2-a^2)\,dx\\ &=xy^3-3a^2xy+3a^2\int y\,dx+3a^2\int x\,dy-3\int y^3\,dx+3a^2\int y\,dx\\ &=xy^3-3a^2xy+6a^2\int y\,dx+3a^2\int x\,dy-3\int y^3\,dx\\ &=xy^3-3a^2xy+3a^2\int d(xy)+3a^4\int\frac{dy}{x}+\frac{3a^2}{2}\int d(xy)-\frac{3a^4}{2}\int\frac{dy}{x}-3\int y^3\,dx\\ &=xy^3+\frac{3a^2}{2}xy+\frac{3a^4}{2}\int \frac{dx}{y}-3\int y^3d\\ &=\frac{xy^3}{4}+\frac{3a^2}{8}xy+\frac{3a^4}{8}\ln\vert x+y\vert+C\\ &=\frac{x\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}}{4}+\frac{3a^2}{8}x\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+\frac{3a^4}{8}\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\vert+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​=∫y​3​​dx​=xy​3​​−∫xdy​3​​​=xy​3​​−3∫y​2​​xdy​=xy​3​​−3∫(x​2​​+a​2​​)xdy​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​∫xdy−3∫x​3​​dy​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​xy+3a​2​​∫ydx−3∫x​3​​dy​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​xy+3∫(y​3​​−x​2​​y)dx−3∫x​3​​dy​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​xy+3∫y​3​​dx−3∫(y​2​​−a​2​​)ydx−3∫(y​2​​−a​2​​)xdy​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​xy+3a​2​​∫ydx+3a​2​​∫xdy−3∫y​2​​xdy​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​xy+3a​2​​∫ydx+3a​2​​∫xdy−3∫y(y​2​​−a​2​​)dx​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​xy+3a​2​​∫ydx+3a​2​​∫xdy−3∫y​3​​dx+3a​2​​∫ydx​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​xy+6a​2​​∫ydx+3a​2​​∫xdy−3∫y​3​​dx​=xy​3​​−3a​2​​xy+3a​2​​∫d(xy)+3a​4​​∫​x​​dy​​+​2​​3a​2​​​​∫d(xy)−​2​​3a​4​​​​∫​x​​dy​​−3∫y​3​​dx​=xy​3​​+​2​​3a​2​​​​xy+​2​​3a​4​​​​∫​y​​dx​​−3∫y​3​​d​=​4​​xy​3​​​​+​8​​3a​2​​​​xy+​8​​3a​4​​​​ln∣x+y∣+C​=​4​​x√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​+​8​​3a​2​​​​x√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+​8​​3a​4​​​​ln∣x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

41.∫xx2+a2dx=13(x2+a2)3+C\begin{aligned} 41.\int x\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\,dx=\frac{1}{3}\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}+C \end{aligned}​41.∫x√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​dx=​3​​1​​√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫xx2+a2dx=∫xydx=∫y2dy=y33+C=13(x2+a2)3+C\begin{aligned} \int x\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\,dx&=\int xy\,dx\\ &=\int y^2\,dy\\ &=\frac{y^3}{3}+C\\ &=\frac{1}{3}\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}+C \end{aligned} ​∫x√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​dx​​​​​​=∫xydx​=∫y​2​​dy​=​3​​y​3​​​​+C​=​3​​1​​√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​+C​​

42.∫x2x2+a2dx=x8(2x2+a2)x2+a2−a48ln(x+x2+a2)+C\begin{aligned} 42.\int x^2\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\,dx=\frac{x}{8}(2x^2+a^2)\sqrt{x^2+a^2}-\frac{a^4}{8}\ln(x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2})+C \end{aligned}​42.∫x​2​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​dx=​8​​x​​(2x​2​​+a​2​​)√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​−​8​​a​4​​​​ln(x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​)+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2x2+a2dx=∫x2ydx=∫(y2−a2)ydx=∫y3dx−a2∫ydx=14xy3+34⋅2(y2−x2)xy+34⋅2(y2−x2)2∫dxy−a2(12xy+12(y2−x2)∫dxy)=14xy3−18a2xy−18a4ln∣x+y∣+C=14x(x2+a2)3−18a2xx2+a2−18a4ln∣x+x2+a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int x^2\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\,dx&=\int x^2y\,dx\\ &=\int (y^2-a^2)ydx\\ &=\int y^3\,dx-a^2\int y\,dx\\ &=\frac{1}{4}xy^3+\frac{3}{4\cdot 2}(y^2-x^2)xy+\frac{3}{4\cdot2}(y^2-x^2)^2\int\frac{dx}{y}-a^2\left(\frac{1}{2}xy+\frac{1}{2}(y^2-x^2)\int\frac{dx}{y}\right)\\ &=\frac{1}{4}xy^3-\frac{1}{8}a^2xy-\frac{1}{8}a^4\ln{\vert x+y\vert}+C\\ &=\frac{1}{4}x\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}-\frac{1}{8}a^2x\sqrt{x^2+a^2}-\frac{1}{8}a^4\ln{\vert x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\vert}+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫x​2​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​=∫x​2​​ydx​=∫(y​2​​−a​2​​)ydx​=∫y​3​​dx−a​2​​∫ydx​=​4​​1​​xy​3​​+​4⋅2​​3​​(y​2​​−x​2​​)xy+​4⋅2​​3​​(y​2​​−x​2​​)​2​​∫​y​​dx​​−a​2​​(​2​​1​​xy+​2​​1​​(y​2​​−x​2​​)∫​y​​dx​​)​=​4​​1​​xy​3​​−​8​​1​​a​2​​xy−​8​​1​​a​4​​ln∣x+y∣+C​=​4​​1​​x√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​−​8​​1​​a​2​​x√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​−​8​​1​​a​4​​ln∣x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

43.∫x2+a2xdx=x2+a2+alnx2+a2−a∣x∣+C\begin{aligned} 43.\int \frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}{x}\,dx=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+a\ln\frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}-a}{\vert x\vert}+C \end{aligned}​43.∫​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+aln​∣x∣​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​−a​​+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2+a2xdx=∫yxdx=∫yxx2dx=∫y2x2dy=∫x2+a2x2dy=∫dy+a2∫dyy2−a2=y+a2ln∣y−ay+a∣+C=y+a2ln∣(y−a)2y2−a2∣+C=y+aln∣y−ax∣+C=x2+a2+alnx2+a2−a∣x∣+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}{x}\,dx&=\int\frac{y}{x}\,dx\\ &=\int\frac{yx}{x^2}\,dx\\ &=\int\frac{y^2}{x^2}\,dy\\ &=\int\frac{x^2+a^2}{x^2}dy\\ &=\int\,dy+a^2\int\frac{dy}{y^2-a^2}\\ &=y+\frac{a}{2}\ln\vert\frac{y-a}{y+a}\vert+C\\ &=y+\frac{a}{2}\ln\vert\frac{(y-a)^2}{y^2-a^2}\vert+C\\ &=y+a\ln\vert\frac{y-a}{x}\vert+C\\ &=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+a\ln\frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}-a}{\vert x\vert}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​​=∫​x​​y​​dx​=∫​x​2​​​​yx​​dx​=∫​x​2​​​​y​2​​​​dy​=∫​x​2​​​​x​2​​+a​2​​​​dy​=∫dy+a​2​​∫​y​2​​−a​2​​​​dy​​​=y+​2​​a​​ln∣​y+a​​y−a​​∣+C​=y+​2​​a​​ln∣​y​2​​−a​2​​​​(y−a)​2​​​​∣+C​=y+aln∣​x​​y−a​​∣+C​=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+aln​∣x∣​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​−a​​+C​​

44.∫x2+a2x2dx=−x2+a2x+ln(x+x2+a2)+C\begin{aligned} 44.\int \frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}{x^2}\,dx=-\frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}{x}+\ln(x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2})+C \end{aligned}​44.∫​x​2​​​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx=−​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​+ln(x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​)+C​​

设y=x2+a2y=\sqrt{x^2+a^2}y=√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2+a2x2dx=∫yx2dx=−∫yd1x=−yx+∫dyx=−yx+ln∣x+y∣+C=−x2+a2x+ln∣x+x2+a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}{x^2}\,dx&=\int\frac{y}{x^2}\,dx\\ &=-\int yd\frac{1}{x}\\ &=-\frac{y}{x}+\int\frac{dy}{x}\\ &=-\frac{y}{x}+\ln\vert x+y\vert+C\\ &=-\frac{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}{x}+\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x​2​​​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​=∫​x​2​​​​y​​dx​=−∫yd​x​​1​​​=−​x​​y​​+∫​x​​dy​​​=−​x​​y​​+ln∣x+y∣+C​=−​x​​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​+ln∣x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

含有x2−a2(a>0)\sqrt{x^2-a^2}(a>0)√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​(a>0)的积分

45.∫dxx2−a2=x∣x∣⋅arsh∣x∣a+C1=ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} 45.\int \frac{dx}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}=\frac{x}{\vert x\vert}\cdot arsh\frac{\vert x\vert}{a}+C1=\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2}\vert+C \end{aligned}​45.∫​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​dx​​=​∣x∣​​x​​⋅arsh​a​​∣x∣​​+C1=ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫dxx2−a2=∫dxy=ln∣x+y∣+C=ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{dx}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}&=\int\frac{dx}{y}\\ &=\ln{\vert x+y\vert}+C\\ &=\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2}\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​=∫​y​​dx​​​=ln∣x+y∣+C​=ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

46.∫dx(x2−a2)3=−xa2x2−a2+C\begin{aligned} 46.\int \frac{dx}{\sqrt{(x^2-a^2)^3}}=-\frac{x}{a^2\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}+C \end{aligned}​46.∫​√​(x​2​​−a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​dx​​=−​a​2​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​x​​+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫dx(x2−a2)3=∫dxy3=∫1y2⋅dxy=∫1y2⋅ydx−xdyy2−x2=∫1y2⋅y2d(xy)y2−x2=−1a2∫dxy=−xa2y=−xa2x2−a2+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{dx}{\sqrt{(x^2-a^2)^3}}&=\int\frac{dx}{y^3}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{y^2}\cdot\frac{dx}{y}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{y^2}\cdot\frac{ydx-xdy}{y^2-x^2}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{y^2}\cdot\frac{y^2d(\frac{x}{y})}{y^2-x^2}\\ &=-\frac{1}{a^2}\int\,d\frac{x}{y}\\ &=-\frac{x}{a^2y}\\ &=-\frac{x}{a^2\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​(x​2​​−a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​​=∫​y​3​​​​dx​​​=∫​y​2​​​​1​​⋅​y​​dx​​​=∫​y​2​​​​1​​⋅​y​2​​−x​2​​​​ydx−xdy​​​=∫​y​2​​​​1​​⋅​y​2​​−x​2​​​​y​2​​d(​y​​x​​)​​​=−​a​2​​​​1​​∫d​y​​x​​​=−​a​2​​y​​x​​​=−​a​2​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​x​​+C​​

47.∫xx2−a2dx=x2−a2+C\begin{aligned} 47.\int \frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}\,dx=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}+C \end{aligned}​47.∫​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​x​​dx=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫xx2−a2dx=∫xdxy=∫ydyy=y+C=x2−a2+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}\,dx&=\int\frac{xdx}{y}\\ &=\int\frac{ydy}{y}\\ &=y+C\\ &=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​x​​dx​​​​​​=∫​y​​xdx​​​=∫​y​​ydy​​​=y+C​=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​+C​​

48.∫x(x2−a2)3dx=−1x2−a2+C\begin{aligned} 48.\int \frac{x}{\sqrt{(x^2-a^2)^3}}\,dx=-\frac{1}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}+C \end{aligned}​48.∫​√​(x​2​​−a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​x​​dx=−​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​1​​+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x(x2−a2)3dx=∫xdxy3=∫dyy2=−1y+C=−1x2+a2+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{x}{\sqrt{(x^2-a^2)^3}}\,dx&=\int\frac{xdx}{y^3}\\ &=\int\frac{dy}{y^2}\\ &=-\frac{1}{y}+C\\ &=-\frac{1}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​(x​2​​−a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​x​​dx​​​​​​=∫​y​3​​​​xdx​​​=∫​y​2​​​​dy​​​=−​y​​1​​+C​=−​√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​​​1​​+C​​

49.∫x2x2−a2dx=x2x2−a2+a22⋅ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} 49.\int \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}\,dx=\frac{x}{2}\sqrt{x^2-a^2}+\frac{a^2}{2}\cdot\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2}\vert+C \end{aligned}​49.∫​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​x​2​​​​dx=​2​​x​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​+​2​​a​2​​​​⋅ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2x2−a2dx=∫x2dxy=∫xdy=12∫(xdy+ydx)+(xdy−ydx)=12∫d(xy)+a22∫xdy−ydxx2−y2=12xy+a22∫dyx=12xy+a22ln∣x+y∣+C=x2x2−a2+a22⋅ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}\,dx&=\int\frac{x^2\,dx}{y}\\ &=\int xdy\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int(xdy+ydx)+(xdy-ydx)\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int d(xy)+\frac{a^2}{2}\int\frac{xdy-ydx}{x^2-y^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{2}xy+\frac{a^2}{2}\int\frac{dy}{x}\\ &=\frac{1}{2}xy+\frac{a^2}{2}\ln\vert x+y\vert+C\\ &=\frac{x}{2}\sqrt{x^2-a^2}+\frac{a^2}{2}\cdot\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2}\vert+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​x​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​=∫​y​​x​2​​dx​​​=∫xdy​=​2​​1​​∫(xdy+ydx)+(xdy−ydx)​=​2​​1​​∫d(xy)+​2​​a​2​​​​∫​x​2​​−y​2​​​​xdy−ydx​​​=​2​​1​​xy+​2​​a​2​​​​∫​x​​dy​​​=​2​​1​​xy+​2​​a​2​​​​ln∣x+y∣+C​=​2​​x​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​+​2​​a​2​​​​⋅ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

50.∫x2(x2−a2)3dx=−xx2−a2+ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} 50.\int \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{(x^2-a^2)^3}}\,dx=-\frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}+\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2\vert}+C \end{aligned}​50.∫​√​(x​2​​−a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​x​2​​​​dx=−​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​x​​+ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​∣​​​+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2(x2−a2)3dx=∫x2dxy3=∫xy2dy=−∫xd1y=−xy+∫dxy=−xy+ln∣x+y∣+C=−xx2−a2+ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{(x^2-a^2)^3}}\,dx&=\int\frac{x^2dx}{y^3}\\ &=\int\frac{x}{y^2}\,dy\\ &=-\int x\,d\frac{1}{y}\\ &=-\frac{x}{y}+\int\frac{dx}{y}\\ &=-\frac{x}{y}+\ln\vert x+y\vert+C\\ &=-\frac{x}{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}+\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2\vert}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​√​(x​2​​−a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​x​2​​​​dx​​​​​​​​=∫​y​3​​​​x​2​​dx​​​=∫​y​2​​​​x​​dy​=−∫xd​y​​1​​​=−​y​​x​​+∫​y​​dx​​​=−​y​​x​​+ln∣x+y∣+C​=−​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​x​​+ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​∣​​​+C​​

51.∫dxxx2−a2=1aarccosa∣x∣+C\begin{aligned} 51.\int \frac{dx}{x\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}=\frac{1}{a}arccos\frac{a}{\vert x\vert}+C \end{aligned}​51.∫​x√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​dx​​=​a​​1​​arccos​∣x∣​​a​​+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫dxxx2−a2=∫dxxy=∫dyx2=∫dyy2+a2=1a∫d(ya)(ya)2+1=1aarctanya+C=1aarctanx2−a2a+C=1aarccosa∣x∣+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{dx}{x\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}&=\int\frac{dx}{xy}\\ &=\int\frac{dy}{x^2}\\ &=\int\frac{dy}{y^2+a^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{a}\int\frac{d(\frac{y}{a})}{(\frac{y}{a})^2+1}\\ &=\frac{1}{a}arctan\frac{y}{a}+C\\ &=\frac{1}{a}arctan\frac{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}{a}+C\\ &=\frac{1}{a}arccos\frac{a}{\vert x\vert}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​​=∫​xy​​dx​​​=∫​x​2​​​​dy​​​=∫​y​2​​+a​2​​​​dy​​​=​a​​1​​∫​(​a​​y​​)​2​​+1​​d(​a​​y​​)​​​=​a​​1​​arctan​a​​y​​+C​=​a​​1​​arctan​a​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​+C​=​a​​1​​arccos​∣x∣​​a​​+C​​

52.∫dxx2x2−a2=x2−a2a2x+C\begin{aligned} 52.\int \frac{dx}{x^2\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}=\frac{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}{a^2x}+C \end{aligned}​52.∫​x​2​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​dx​​=​a​2​​x​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫dxx2x2−a2=∫dxx2y=∫dyx3=∫1x2⋅xdy−ydxx2−y2=∫1x2⋅x2d(yx)x2−y2=1a2∫d(yx)=ya2x+C=x2−a2a2x+C\begin{aligned} \int \frac{dx}{x^2\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}&=\int\frac{dx}{x^2y}\\ &=\int\frac{dy}{x^3}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{x^2}\cdot\frac{xdy-ydx}{x^2-y^2}\\ &=\int\frac{1}{x^2}\cdot\frac{x^2d(\frac{y}{x})}{x^2-y^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{a^2}\int\,d(\frac{y}{x})\\ &=\frac{y}{a^2x}+C\\ &=\frac{\sqrt{x^2-a^2}}{a^2x}+C \end{aligned} ​∫​x​2​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​​=∫​x​2​​y​​dx​​​=∫​x​3​​​​dy​​​=∫​x​2​​​​1​​⋅​x​2​​−y​2​​​​xdy−ydx​​​=∫​x​2​​​​1​​⋅​x​2​​−y​2​​​​x​2​​d(​x​​y​​)​​​=​a​2​​​​1​​∫d(​x​​y​​)​=​a​2​​x​​y​​+C​=​a​2​​x​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​​​+C​​

53.∫x2−a2dx=x2x2−a2−a22ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} 53.\int \sqrt{x^2-a^2}\,dx=\frac{x}{2}\sqrt{x^2-a^2}-\frac{a^2}{2}\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2\vert}+C \end{aligned}​53.∫√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​dx=​2​​x​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​−​2​​a​2​​​​ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​∣​​​+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫x2−a2dx=∫ydx=12∫(ydx+xdy)+(ydx−xdy)=12∫d(xy)−a22∫ydx−xdyy2−a2=12∫d(xy)−a22∫dxy=xy2−a22ln∣x+y∣+C=x2x2−a2−a22ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int \sqrt{x^2-a^2}\,dx&=\int ydx\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int(ydx+xdy)+(ydx-xdy)\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int d(xy)-\frac{a^2}{2}\int\frac{ydx-xdy}{y^2-a^2}\\ &=\frac{1}{2}\int d(xy)-\frac{a^2}{2}\int\frac{dx}{y}\\ &=\frac{xy}{2}-\frac{a^2}{2}\ln\vert x+y\vert+C\\ &=\frac{x}{2}\sqrt{x^2-a^2}-\frac{a^2}{2}\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2\vert}+C \end{aligned} ​∫√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​=∫ydx​=​2​​1​​∫(ydx+xdy)+(ydx−xdy)​=​2​​1​​∫d(xy)−​2​​a​2​​​​∫​y​2​​−a​2​​​​ydx−xdy​​​=​2​​1​​∫d(xy)−​2​​a​2​​​​∫​y​​dx​​​=​2​​xy​​−​2​​a​2​​​​ln∣x+y∣+C​=​2​​x​​√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​−​2​​a​2​​​​ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​∣​​​+C​​

54.∫(x2−a2)3dx=x8(2x2−a2)x2−a2+38a4ln∣x+x2−a2∣+C\begin{aligned} 54.\int \sqrt{(x^2-a^2)^3}\,dx=\frac{x}{8}(2x^2-a^2)\sqrt{x^2-a^2}+\frac{3}{8}a^4\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2-a^2}\vert+C \end{aligned}​54.∫√​(x​2​​−a​2​​)​3​​​​​dx=​8​​x​​(2x​2​​−a​2​​)√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​+​8​​3​​a​4​​ln∣x+√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

设y=x2−a2y=\sqrt{x^2-a^2}y=√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​，则有ydy=xdxydy=xdxydy=xdx

∫(x2−a2)3dx=∫y3dx=xy3−∫xdy3=xy3−3∫y2xdy=xy3−3∫(x2−a2)xdy=xy3+3a2∫xdy−3∫x3dy=xy3+3a2xy−3a2∫ydx+3∫x3dy=xy3+3a2xy+3∫(y3−x2y)dx+3∫x3dy=xy3+3a2xy+3∫y3dx−3∫(y2+a2)ydx+3∫(y2+a2)xdy=xy3+3a2xy−3a2∫ydx+3a2∫xdy+3∫y2xdy=xy3+3a2xy−3a2∫ydx+3a2∫xdy+3∫y(y2+a2)dx=xy3+3a2xy−3a2∫ydx+3a2∫xdy+3∫y3dx+3a2∫ydx=xy3+3a2xy+3a2∫xdy+3∫y3dx=xy3+3a2xy+3a2∫d(xy)+3a4∫dyx−3∫y3dx=xy3+3a22xy+3a42∫dxy−3∫y3d=xy34+3a28xy+3a48ln∣x+y∣+C=x(x2+a2)34+3a28xx2+a2+3a48ln∣x+x2+a2∣+C\begin{aligned} \int\sqrt{(x^2-a^2)^3}\,dx &=\int y^3dx \\ &=xy^3-\int x\,dy^3\\ &=xy^3-3\int y^2x\,dy\\ &=xy^3-3\int(x^2-a^2)x\,dy\\ &=xy^3+3a^2\int x\,dy-3\int x^3\,dy\\ &=xy^3+3a^2xy-3a^2\int y\,dx+3\int x^3\,dy\\ &=xy^3+3a^2xy+3\int (y^3-x^2y)\,dx+3\int x^3\,dy\\ &=xy^3+3a^2xy+3\int y^3dx-3\int (y^2+a^2)y\,dx+3\int (y^2+a^2)x\,dy\\ &=xy^3+3a^2xy-3a^2\int y\,dx+3a^2\int x\,dy+3\int y^2x\,dy\\ &=xy^3+3a^2xy-3a^2\int y\,dx+3a^2\int x\,dy+3\int y(y^2+a^2)\,dx\\ &=xy^3+3a^2xy-3a^2\int y\,dx+3a^2\int x\,dy+3\int y^3\,dx+3a^2\int y\,dx\\ &=xy^3+3a^2xy+3a^2\int x\,dy+3\int y^3\,dx\\ &=xy^3+3a^2xy+3a^2\int d(xy)+3a^4\int\frac{dy}{x}-3\int y^3\,dx\\ &=xy^3+\frac{3a^2}{2}xy+\frac{3a^4}{2}\int \frac{dx}{y}-3\int y^3d\\ &=\frac{xy^3}{4}+\frac{3a^2}{8}xy+\frac{3a^4}{8}\ln\vert x+y\vert+C\\ &=\frac{x\sqrt{(x^2+a^2)^3}}{4}+\frac{3a^2}{8}x\sqrt{x^2+a^2}+\frac{3a^4}{8}\ln\vert x+\sqrt{x^2+a^2}\vert+C\\ \end{aligned} ​∫√​(x​2​​−a​2​​)​3​​​​​dx​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​=∫y​3​​dx​=xy​3​​−∫xdy​3​​​=xy​3​​−3∫y​2​​xdy​=xy​3​​−3∫(x​2​​−a​2​​)xdy​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​∫xdy−3∫x​3​​dy​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​xy−3a​2​​∫ydx+3∫x​3​​dy​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​xy+3∫(y​3​​−x​2​​y)dx+3∫x​3​​dy​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​xy+3∫y​3​​dx−3∫(y​2​​+a​2​​)ydx+3∫(y​2​​+a​2​​)xdy​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​xy−3a​2​​∫ydx+3a​2​​∫xdy+3∫y​2​​xdy​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​xy−3a​2​​∫ydx+3a​2​​∫xdy+3∫y(y​2​​+a​2​​)dx​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​xy−3a​2​​∫ydx+3a​2​​∫xdy+3∫y​3​​dx+3a​2​​∫ydx​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​xy+3a​2​​∫xdy+3∫y​3​​dx​=xy​3​​+3a​2​​xy+3a​2​​∫d(xy)+3a​4​​∫​x​​dy​​−3∫y​3​​dx​=xy​3​​+​2​​3a​2​​​​xy+​2​​3a​4​​​​∫​y​​dx​​−3∫y​3​​d​=​4​​xy​3​​​​+​8​​3a​2​​​​xy+​8​​3a​4​​​​ln∣x+y∣+C​=​4​​x√​(x​2​​+a​2​​)​3​​​​​​​+​8​​3a​2​​​​x√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​+​8​​3a​4​​​​ln∣x+√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​∣+C​​

含有a2−x2(a>0)\sqrt{a^2-x^2}(a>0)√​a​2​​−x​2​​​​​(a>0)的积分

含有±ax2+bx+c(a>0)\sqrt{\pm ax^2+bx+c}(a>0)√​±ax​2​​+bx+c​​​(a>0)的积分

含有±x−ax+b\sqrt{\pm \frac{x-a}{x+b}}√​±​x+b​​x−a​​​​​或(x−a)(b−x)\sqrt{(x-a)(b-x)}√​(x−a)(b−x)​​​ 的积分

含有三角函数的积分

含有反三角函数的积分

含有指数函数的积分

含有对数函数的积分

含有双曲函数的积分

定积分

  1. 1. 积分表的推导
    1. 1.1. 含有ax+bax+bax+b的积分
    2. 1.2. 含有ax+b\sqrt{ax+b}√​ax+b​​​的积分
    3. 1.3. 含有x2±a2x^2 \pm a^2x​2​​±a​2​​的积分
    4. 1.4. 含有ax2+b(a>0)ax^2+b(a>0)ax​2​​+b(a>0)的积分
    5. 1.5. 含有ax2+bx+c(a>0)ax^2+bx+c(a>0)ax​2​​+bx+c(a>0)的积分
    6. 1.6. 含有x2+a2(a>0)\sqrt{x^2+a^2}(a>0)√​x​2​​+a​2​​​​​(a>0)的积分
    7. 1.7. 含有x2−a2(a>0)\sqrt{x^2-a^2}(a>0)√​x​2​​−a​2​​​​​(a>0)的积分
    8. 1.8. 含有a2−x2(a>0)\sqrt{a^2-x^2}(a>0)√​a​2​​−x​2​​​​​(a>0)的积分
    9. 1.9. 含有±ax2+bx+c(a>0)\sqrt{\pm ax^2+bx+c}(a>0)√​±ax​2​​+bx+c​​​(a>0)的积分
    10. 1.10. 含有±x−ax+b\sqrt{\pm \frac{x-a}{x+b}}√​±​x+b​​x−a​​​​​或(x−a)(b−x)\sqrt{(x-a)(b-x)}√​(x−a)(b−x)​​​ 的积分
    11. 1.11. 含有三角函数的积分
    12. 1.12. 含有反三角函数的积分
